name: whipplescript-runtime-worker
description: Cloudflare Worker + Durable Object shell for the sans-IO WhippleScript runtime (DR-0033).

scripts.build:wasm: cargo build -p whipplescript-host-do --no-default-features --target wasm32-unknown-unknown --release && wasm-bindgen ../../../target/wasm32-unknown-unknown/release/whipplescript_host_do.wasm --out-dir pkg --target bundler
scripts.validate: cargo build -p whipplescript-host-do --no-default-features --target wasm32-unknown-unknown --release && wasm-bindgen ../../../target/wasm32-unknown-unknown/release/whipplescript_host_do.wasm --out-dir pkg --target nodejs && node validate.cjs
scripts.build:executor: cargo build --release -p whipplescript --bin whip && cp ../../../target/release/whip executor/whip
